result.preview:
"Postgres query exectution error (ProgrammingError): (psycopg2.errors.UndefinedFunction) operator does not exist: text >= timestamp without time zone
LINE 5:     AND createddate >= (DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 mont...
                            ^
HINT:  No operator matches the given name and argument types. You might need to add explicit type casts.

[SQL: WITH recent_cases AS (
  SELECT id AS case_id, ownerid, createddate, closeddate
  FROM "Case"
  WHERE closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND createddate >= (DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
), assignment_counts AS (
  SELECT ch.caseid__c AS case_id, COUNT(*) AS assignment_cnt
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
  GROUP BY ch.caseid__c
), handleable AS (
  SELECT rc.case_id, rc.ownerid,
         EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (rc.closeddate - rc.createddate)) AS handle_seconds
  FROM recent_cases rc
  LEFT JOIN assignment_counts ac ON ac.case_id = rc.case_id
  WHERE COALESCE(ac.assignment_cnt, 0) <= 1
), agent_case_counts AS (
  SELECT ownerid, COUNT(*) AS case_cnt, AVG(handle_seconds) AS avg_handle_seconds
  FROM handleable
  GROUP BY ownerid
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
)
SELECT ownerid AS agent_id
FROM agent_case_counts
ORDER BY avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/f405)"

args.query:
WITH recent_cases AS (
  SELECT id AS case_id, ownerid, createddate, closeddate
  FROM "Case"
  WHERE closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND createddate >= (DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
), assignment_counts AS (
  SELECT ch.caseid__c AS case_id, COUNT(*) AS assignment_cnt
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
  GROUP BY ch.caseid__c
), handleable AS (
  SELECT rc.case_id, rc.ownerid,
         EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (rc.closeddate - rc.createddate)) AS handle_seconds
  FROM recent_cases rc
  LEFT JOIN assignment_counts ac ON ac.case_id = rc.case_id
  WHERE COALESCE(ac.assignment_cnt, 0) <= 1
), agent_case_counts AS (
  SELECT ownerid, COUNT(*) AS case_cnt, AVG(handle_seconds) AS avg_handle_seconds
  FROM handleable
  GROUP BY ownerid
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
)
SELECT ownerid AS agent_id
FROM agent_case_counts
ORDER BY avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;

WITH recent_cases AS (
  SELECT id AS case_id, ownerid, createddate, closeddate
  FROM "Case"
  WHERE closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND createddate >= (DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
), assignment_counts AS (
  SELECT ch.caseid__c AS case_id, COUNT(*) AS assignment_cnt
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
  GROUP BY ch.caseid__c
), handleable AS (
  SELECT rc.case_id, rc.ownerid,
         EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (rc.closeddate - rc.createddate)) AS handle_seconds
  FROM recent_cases rc
  LEFT JOIN assignment_counts ac ON ac.case_id = rc.case_id
  WHERE COALESCE(ac.assignment_cnt, 0) <= 1
), agent_case_counts AS (
  SELECT ownerid, COUNT(*) AS case_cnt, AVG(handle_seconds) AS avg_handle_seconds
  FROM handleable
  GROUP BY ownerid
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
)
SELECT ownerid AS agent_id
FROM agent_case_counts
ORDER BY avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
WITH recent_cases AS (
  SELECT id AS case_id,
         ownerid,
         createddate::timestamp AS created_ts,
         closeddate::timestamp AS closed_ts
  FROM "Case"
  WHERE closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND createddate::timestamp >= ((DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')::timestamp)
), assignment_counts AS (
  SELECT ch.caseid__c AS case_id, COUNT(*) AS assignment_cnt
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
  GROUP BY ch.caseid__c
), handleable AS (
  SELECT rc.case_id, rc.ownerid,
         EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (rc.closed_ts - rc.created_ts)) AS handle_seconds
  FROM recent_cases rc
  LEFT JOIN assignment_counts ac ON ac.case_id = rc.case_id
  WHERE COALESCE(ac.assignment_cnt, 0) <= 1
), agent_case_counts AS (
  SELECT ownerid, COUNT(*) AS case_cnt, AVG(handle_seconds) AS avg_handle_seconds
  FROM handleable
  GROUP BY ownerid
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
)
SELECT ownerid AS agent_id
FROM agent_case_counts
ORDER BY avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
WITH recent_cases AS (
  SELECT id AS case_id,
         ownerid,
         createddate::timestamp AS created_ts,
         closeddate::timestamp AS closed_ts
  FROM "Case"
  WHERE closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND createddate::timestamp >= ((DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')::timestamp)
), assignment_counts AS (
  SELECT ch.caseid__c AS case_id, COUNT(*) AS assignment_cnt
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
  GROUP BY ch.caseid__c
), handleable AS (
  SELECT rc.case_id, rc.ownerid,
         EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (rc.closed_ts - rc.created_ts)) AS handle_seconds
  FROM recent_cases rc
  LEFT JOIN assignment_counts ac ON ac.case_id = rc.case_id
  WHERE COALESCE(ac.assignment_cnt, 0) <= 1
), agent_case_counts AS (
  SELECT ownerid, COUNT(*) AS case_cnt, AVG(handle_seconds) AS avg_handle_seconds
  FROM handleable
  GROUP BY ownerid
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
)
SELECT ownerid AS agent_id
FROM agent_case_counts
ORDER BY avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;
